description_for_human: The OpenClaw ecosystem registry — clones, forks, derivatives, and alternatives cataloged with stars, growth, and health metrics.
description_for_model: Shelldex is a read-only registry of personal AI agent frameworks derived from or alternative to OpenClaw. Use this plugin to search projects by name/language/category, fetch GitHub metadata (stars, forks, issues, last commit, 7-day growth), compare two projects side-by-side, and retrieve the ranked leaderboard. All data is static JSON refreshed at build time. There is no authentication, rate limit, or write interface. Slugs are lowercase, hyphen-separated. Canonical comparison slugs are alphabetical (e.g., `hermes-vs-openclaw`, not `openclaw-vs-hermes`).
